title: Post China Limbo
html:
Post-China Limbo is the nine-month stretch between leaving Shanghai (Dec 14, 2024) and landing in Austin (Sept/Oct 2025) — a Corvallis-anchored bridge chapter where Yahir finished OSU, built Brotein, absorbed the Peacock Bar incident, wrote his first AEO-adjacent product specs (CarBUDDY and IRL Lore), and locked the Austin move into a non-cancellable identity stake. The graph used to skip from China to Austin in one jump — it shouldn't.

Key facts

  • Location: Corvallis, OR (his OSU senior winter/spring/summer), with weekend visits to Grants Pass for family.
  • Status: Finishing OSU coursework (HST 202, Public Speaking 74201, MTH 251 placeholder, capstone scaffolding). ISSA personal training cert in motion as bridge income.
  • Active project: Brotein — codes, Supabase uploads, leaderboard, group share, "WeRun" group, TikTok marketing. Pre-Rankett primary venture, the BroMenu camera scan UX from the China chapter getting built out.
  • Side specs: CarBUDDY / AI Traffic Companion PRD and IRL Lore PRD — the PRD-shopping period.
  • Financial weather: $1900 owed to Jeff (landlord), JCEF/PCC/redwood/Al Forthan scholarship juggling, gym-job bridge planning, "trump card is the insurance money."
  • Family weather: Dad post-DUI / recovering (alcoholism context per alcoholism in the family); mom still at Olive Garden + caring for grandpa Eddie; the mom house by the river aspiration becomes more urgent.
  • The Sam thread: stalking order packet in March, the Peacock Bar incident same week — the post-breakup conflict from 2024-04 escalates into legal documentation.

Chronological arc

January 2025 — Re-entry shock. "Thoughts and things 1/4/2025" is 2.5 days back in Corvallis, hair-greying anxiety over the Jeff rent debt. "WTF to do pre AGI" frames the off-hours window as finite — "build apps." Jan 15 is the first explicit articulation that Brotein won't deliver validation — autotelic-frame-as-antidote, "plus ultra" as motto. Yahir notices he's self-isolating in his room and accepts it as cost.

February 2025 — Mantra collection mode. Eli's four line mantra catalog ("thank god thank god / keep the main thing the main thing / if you're about it, be about it / goddamn goddamn") sits next to the Pruhliere proverbs later — friend-mantra cataloging as a coping form. Conspiracy theory notes start surfacing — the apple notes junk drawer gets weirder.

March 2025 — The dip. Peacock Bar incident (Mar 1) is the rupture moment — chance encounter with a former partner after 10 months no-contact, escalation, taser, bouncer, handcuffs, vitals checked, released. Two weeks later "life feels heavy" is the most concentrated emotional-weather note of the 2025 corpus: "life has felt very heavy recently and these are type of moments. That'll get people to just stop living." The dip-and-pivot manifesto form mirrors the Shanghai manifesto six months earlier — same vocabulary, darker context. Stalking order legal packet same week.

April 2025 — Climb-out, gratitude pass. "People I am indebted to" — six-line gratitude list naming Ford Family Foundation, chan taylor, brenda aguilera, family, Boys and Girls Club, Kim. Half the list is institutions that scaffold poor-and-small-town kids — same instinct that later refuses outside capital for Rankett per no runway discipline. Piercing prompts catalog gets started.

May 2025 — The Austin scaffolding gets built. Austin move plan (May 21) — June 9–11 scouting trip planned, $1,100/mo 2BR target with Cam Jipp as roommate-on-the-fence, "increase our surface area of luck" thesis. Comrades for legacy list. May 30 todos note becomes the operational backbone of the limbo — running list spanning May 2025 through April 2026.

June 2025 — Goodbyes. Seven name goodbye list (Cameron Canfield, Raahi, Yoonie, Steven Sarber, Memphis 7/11, Arman Cuba Salsa Dancing, Yussef IHOUSE Kuwait, Liam Smyth) — pre-Austin closeout cohort, distinct from the Comrades list. Same two-wave structure (friends June, family August) Yahir used closing the china chapter. Wedding list surfaces as a forward-looking artifact.

July 2025 — The fraud-fear lock. "My entire personality has been im moving to Austin" — one-sentence note, second-person, written T-minus-7-weeks: "You feel that if this doesnt happen you are a fraud and failed." Functions as a commitment device — the fear of not doing engine pointed at a single specific action. The lock worked.

August 2025 — PRD-shopping + RV pivot. Plan for Austin adds the RV option (dad's 2016 RV as "beachhead"), runs five different futures in parallel (RV solo / RV w/Cam / apartment solo / apartment w/Cam / delay-and-grind-Oregon). Same week, CarBUDDY PRD (Whisper + GPT-5 Mini + AVSpeechSynthesizer for solo-driver passenger AI) and IRL Lore PRD — both fully-architected app concepts that never ship because rankett absorbs the bandwidth. Family side goodbye list (Tío Edgar, Grandpa Eddie, Kai). Emily note — same manifesto cadence as the Plan for Austin doc.

Recurring themes

  • The "Thoughts and things" series as emotional barometer — three entries this window (1/4, 1/15, 2/12), all anxiety-and-pivot dip-form. Form continues into July 25/26 and the late night cluster.
  • Brotein as proving-ground for the eventual Rankett architecture — supabase + camera UX + leaderboard + agency-style network effects. Per brotein as rankett prototype: every Rankett feature has a Brotein prototype.
  • Gratitude-list / mantra-catalog as climb-out form — Eli mantras, Pruhliere proverbs, Piercing prompts, indebted-to list, Comrades list. Yahir catalogues who/what is sustaining him repeatedly during this window because the day-to-day is unstable.
  • Self-funded posture hardening — the no runway discipline instinct gets named here; the refusal-to-owe pattern shows up in the gratitude list and later in the Rankett "no raise" stance.
  • The Cam Jipp partnership beginning to fray — May "lease cosign hesitation," August "result-driven not mission-driven" critique in the IRL Lore PRD Tab 7. The thread that resolves with diddles taking the operating-partner slot in 2026.
  • The first AEO-adjacent thinking — Yahir is reading karpathy notes alongside building Brotein; the AGI-as-deadline framing in 2025 01 06 wtf to do pre agi is the same urgency that crystallizes into the AI search thesis and rankett pivot a year later.

Source summaries

  • 2025 01 05 Thoughts and things on 142025 — re-entry to Corvallis, $1900 Jeff debt
  • 2025 01 06 wtf to do pre agi — pre-AGI window, "build apps"
  • 2025 01 15 THoughts and things 1152025 — Brotein won't deliver validation, autotelic + plus-ultra
  • 2025 02 01 eli life advice — four-line Eli mantra catalog
  • 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident — the rupture moment
  • 2025 03 15 life feels heavy — the most concentrated dip-form note of 2025
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me — six-line gratitude list
  • 2025 05 21 austin move plan — Austin scouting plan, Cam-as-roommate question
  • 2025 05 30 todos — operational backbone running list
  • 2025 06 09 goodbyes — pre-Austin friends-side closeout
  • 2025 07 29 im moving to austin personality fear — fraud-fear lock at T-minus-7-weeks
  • 2025 08 13 plan for austin — RV pivot + 5-scenario fork
  • 2025 08 13 ai traffic companion idea — CarBUDDY PRD
  • 2025 08 29 irl lore prd — IRL Lore PRD + Cam critique

Connections

  • china chapter — the chapter that ends; this is its aftermath
  • end of chapter reflection — the form Yahir uses to close out chapters; bookends this limbo on both sides
  • the austin thesis — the chapter that begins; this is its prologue
  • brotein — the project that fills the limbo
  • — the parallel hedges (CarBUDDY, IRL Lore) that get shelved when Rankett arrives
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — the loneliness pattern intensifies in this window
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — Brotein's arc through this window
  • the china chapter as comparative anthropology — the framework Yahir absorbed in Shanghai gets stress-tested here
  • corvallis or — the geographic anchor
  • austin tx — the destination this whole window is preparing for
  • cam jipp — the partner whose commitment fades across this window
  • no runway discipline — the financial posture that solidifies here
  • apartment hunt 2025 — the May-Aug subsection
  • bridge income strategies — ISSA cert, gym shifts, scholarship juggling
  • late night writing patterns — the timestamp signature of the limbo's emotional notes
  • The Sam thread — Peacock Bar + stalking-order legal action sit inside this window (see 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident and 2025 03 12 stalking packet)
